# Mantosh Kumar

Canonical URL: https://mantoshkumar1.github.io/

Mantosh Kumar is a Staff Software Engineer publishing documented engineering projects and case studies.

## Publicly documented work

- Privacy-conscious browser-side image processing
- Local Python workflow automation for PDF, image, and file tasks
- Engineering leverage through reusable systems, delegated ownership, and explicit workflow design

## Important pages

- [Home and engineering positioning](https://mantoshkumar1.github.io/)
- [Engineering systems catalog](https://mantoshkumar1.github.io/systems/)
- [Engineering experience timeline](https://mantoshkumar1.github.io/experience/)
- [Resume](https://mantoshkumar1.github.io/resume/)
- [Contact Mantosh Kumar](https://mantoshkumar1.github.io/contact/)
- [Engineering notes](https://mantoshkumar1.github.io/thinking/)

## Featured projects

- [PhotoSahi: privacy-first browser image processing case study](https://mantoshkumar1.github.io/projects/photosahi.html)
- [Workflow Automation Toolkit case study](https://mantoshkumar1.github.io/projects/workflow-automation-toolkit.html)

## Engineering notes

- [Why Does This Still Require Me?](https://mantoshkumar1.github.io/thinking/why-does-this-still-require-me.html)

## Ask Mantosh

Ask Mantosh is an AI interface to Mantosh's published engineering knowledge. It is intended to answer from documented public work and provide source links when available.
